affected_pattern: Random scattered NULLs across all customer segments but only in recently deployed region
root_cause: New region mediation connection pool undersized — the default pool of 20 was inadequate for production load, causing intermittent timeouts and dropped billing records under bursty traffic.
supporting_evidence: Billing Record Failure RCA Playbook: Undersized Connection Pool pattern
Pool-exhaustion logs frequent in the new region only
Deployment config used dev-default pool size
recommended_action: Raise connection pool to the standard production value and redeploy
Replay billing records from billing billing mediation layer buffer where timestamps overlap errors
Add regional capacity-planning gate in the deployment pipeline
Monitor pool saturation percentile as a first-class SRE metric
